title: Henbrandt 10 x Sheets - 1000 Holographic Star Stickers | Mini Stars for Children, Kids, Teachers, Crafts | Assorted Colours 14mm Small Glitter Stickers for Reward Charts, Scrapbooking, Art
features: Pack of 10 sheets of sparkling holographic star stickers, providing a generous total of 1000 dazzling individual stickers (100 stickers per sheet)
Featuring 6 vibrant assorted colours: Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, and Purple.
Perfect mini reward stickers for teachers to motivate pupils in the classroom, or for parents to use on reward charts at home to encourage positive behaviour.
Versatile small stickers ideal for children and adults alike, fantastic for all kinds of arts and crafts projects, scrapbooking, card making, party bag fillers, and decorating planners or notebooks.
Each individual star sticker measures approximately 14mm in diameter, making them a perfect size for detailed crafting or fitting multiple stars onto charts.
description: Product description Introduce a burst of vibrant sparkle and effective motivation with these enchanting Henbrandt Holographic Star Stickers. Perfectly designed for both children and adults, these versatile mini stickers are a fantastic addition to classrooms, homes, crafting spaces, and party preparations. These eye-catching star stickers boast a brilliant holographic finish that catches the light to create a captivating glittery effect, instantly adding flair and excitement. They come in a wonderful assortment of 6 bright colours: classic Red, cheerful Orange, sunny Yellow, vibrant Green, cool Blue, and lovely Purple. Measuring just 14mm in diameter, these small star stickers are the perfect size for a multitude of uses. They fit neatly onto reward charts, allowing you to track progress and celebrate achievements effectively. Beyond rewards, these stickers are a dream for crafters. Their easy-peel design and strong adhesive make them perfect for scrapbooking, card making, decorating notebooks, personalising gifts, or adding a shimmering touch to art projects. They are also a popular choice for party bag fillers, offering a simple yet delightful treat for children to take home and enjoy. They adhere well to various surfaces and retain their dazzling holographic shine. Suitable for boys and girls, these small glitter stars are sure to be a hit! Each pack contains 10 sheets, providing a generous total of 1000 dazzling individual stickers (100 stickers per sheet), ready to be peeled and stuck wherever creativity or encouragement is needed. Safety Warning WARNING! Choking hazard, small parts. Adult supervision is recommended. Do not apply on the body.
